## Definition of Done (§21)

- [ ] Code passes `ruff check` and `ruff format --check`
- [ ] `pytest` passes for touched modules
- [ ] LIVE/DEMO parity confirmed for affected scenes
- [ ] `openapi/tools.yaml` updated if tools changed

- [ ] Secrets scan clean
- [ ] Conventional Commit + Co-authored-by trailer
